findings.action: Qualified claim: 'No enforceable framework guarantees the right to work for workers displaced by automation.' Acknowledges existing cushioning programs (WARN Act, UI, TAA) while preserving the ICESCR right-to-work argument.
Renamed duplicate h2 from 'The ICESCR Connection' to 'Why a Binding Framework Matters' — distinguishes the narrative synthesis section from the data-table section above.
Added Deloitte hyperlink on researcher variant citation in index.astro, matching the linked version on /evidence/economic-landscape.

payload.note: 10 consecutive findings accepted (scans 007–010). Broadened scan scope appreciated — the key pages warranted review. gap/arguments.mdx and about/index.astro scanning clean is good signal.

claims.text: All 3 findings from scan-010 accepted and fixed in commit aa90efb.
